ksa_text: Conduct code reviews evaluating code quality, testing standards, performance implications, documentation completeness, and adherence to team coding standards.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Edge-domain Technical Foundations KSA with insufficient signal strength (composite score 0.442) to justify inclusion for the Director of Master Data Management. Without stronger framework alignment, this task KSA does not meet the inclusion threshold.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope, seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with exclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Could this edge-domain task KSA be expected in real-world Director of Master Data Management roles, even if not core to the role definition?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Job market analysis and framework role definitions confirm Technical Foundations is not a standard competency expectation for Director of Master Data Management. Edge-case exclusion is consistent with external evidence.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: external evidence does not support including this edge-domain KSA in the Director of Master Data Management competency profile. Exclusion maintained.

decision_rationale: Insufficient signal (score 0.442) and edge-domain placement (Technical Foundations) do not meet inclusion threshold for the Director of Master Data Management. All passes support exclusion.
